body.title: Granny launcher: ./granny root script (tmux session, register, start daemon)
body.result: ./granny launcher: tmux session + daemon start, --no-attach flag; uu auto-starts granny on launch
body.description:
Add a ./granny root launcher at UnseenUniversity/ (Python, mirrors ./igor pattern from T-uu-root-launchers). The launcher: (1) starts or attaches to a tmux session named 'granny', (2) runs python -m devices.granny.daemon in that session, (3) registers Granny with the web server (/api/agents/register) with agent_id=granny-weatherwax. Also adds granny to the ./uu startup flow so it starts alongside igor and librarian.

**Affected files:** granny (new root launcher), uu (add granny to startup), devices/granny/daemon.py (add __main__ entry)
**Design rules:** mirrors ./igor pattern exactly
**Scope boundary:** launcher + tmux attach only. No new capabilities.
**Test plan:** import devices.granny.daemon; verify daemon.GrannyDaemon() constructs without error; verify __main__ entry exists
